name: 互联网入门
subject: cs
domain_name: 网络与数字安全 / Networks & Digital Safety / Networks & Safety
curriculum_points: Describe the Internet as a global network that connects computers and allows them to share information.
Use a web browser safely to navigate to a given website and perform a simple search.
